name: dry-run: `aggregator` with --dry-run produces no filesystem writes
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --root tree --emit-output rubric-out.yaml --dry-run >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ ! -e rubric-out.yaml ] && echo ok 1>&2
setup:
mkdir -p tree && printf 'source:
  id: src-1
  authoritative_publisher: A
  authoritative_url: https://a.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules: []
' > tree/a.yaml

printf '%b
' '- id: src-1
  name: A
  url: https://a.com
  tier: 1
  applies_to: [typescript]
  fetch_frequency: daily' > STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
